evals.prompt:
I need a hotel comparison report for the Martinez/Chen wedding, October 9-11, 2026. The ceremony venue is The Olde Pink House in Savannah. Here are the two offers I got:

HOTEL 1: The DeSoto Savannah, 15 E Liberty St, Savannah, GA 31401. Website https://www.thedesotosavannah.com. TripAdvisor ranked #24 of 141 hotels in Savannah (https://www.tripadvisor.com/Hotel_Review-g60814-d89542-Reviews-The_DeSoto-Savannah_Georgia.html). Rates: Deluxe King $249/night (normally $419), Deluxe Double Queen $259 (normally $429). Features: on-site restaurant & bar - 1540 Room and Edgar's Proof & Provision, room service, outdoor saltwater pool, fitness center, valet parking $42 per car per night (subject to change). Concessions: complimentary gift bag distribution at the front desk (non-personalized), complimentary Wi-Fi, group rates honored one day before and one day after official block dates. Contracting: hotel can offer 10 rooms per night on a courtesy agreement, courtesy agreement means NO financial responsibility to client. Distance from venue: 0.3 miles. Cut-off: 30 days prior to arrival, by September 9, 2026.

HOTEL 2: Hyatt Regency Savannah, 2 W Bay St, Savannah, GA 31401. Website https://www.hyatt.com/hyatt-regency/en-US/savrs-hyatt-regency-savannah. TripAdvisor #67 of 141 hotels in Savannah (https://www.tripadvisor.com/Hotel_Review-g60814-d111752-Reviews-Hyatt_Regency_Savannah-Savannah_Georgia.html). Rates: River View King $229 (rack $389), River View Two Queens $239 (rack $399), City View King $209 (rack $359). Features: on-site restaurant - Moss + Oak Savannah Eatery, indoor pool, fitness center, business center, valet parking $40 per night subject to change. Concessions: complimentary Wi-Fi, complimentary gift bag distribution at front desk (non-personalized). Contracting: 80% attrition - client financially responsible for 80% of contracted room block, minimum 10 rooms per night, credit card authorization form needed at contract signing. Distance: 0.4 miles. Cut-off: 45 days prior to arrival, by August 25, 2026.

Please create the Word document report.
evals.expected_output: A .docx hotel comparison report with title block, two hotel sections with correct 6pt/10pt spacer paragraphs, gray-shaded rate tables that fit the page, TripAdvisor logos and hyperlinked rankings, divider lines, and one JC Room Blocks contact line at the end.

evals.prompt:
make me a hotel comparison report doc for the Birch/Kowalski wedding May 14-16, 2027, venue is the Biltmore Estate in Asheville. two hotels:

1) Grand Bohemian Hotel Asheville, 11 Boston Way, Asheville, NC 28803, https://www.kesslercollection.com/bohemian-asheville/ - tripadvisor #18 of 28 hotels in Asheville, link: https://www.tripadvisor.com/Hotel_Review-g60742-d1505353-Reviews-Grand_Bohemian_Hotel_Asheville_Autograph_Collection-Asheville_North_Carolina.html. rates: Premier Two Queen Mountain View Suite with Balcony and Kitchenette $389 (reg $599), Classic King $339 (reg $529). features: on-site restaurant & bar - Red Stag Grill, art gallery, fitness center, valet parking $35/night subject to change. concessions: complimentary wifi, complimentary gift bag distribution at the front desk (non-personalized). contracting: hotel can offer 10 rooms per night on a courtesy agreement, courtesy agreement - NO financial responsibility to client. distance 0.2 miles, cutoff 30 days prior to arrival by April 14, 2027.

2) The Radical, 95 Roberts St, Asheville NC 28801, https://www.theradicalhotel.com - I couldn't find a tripadvisor ranking for this one, it's a newer hotel. rates: King Studio $279 (reg $409), Double Queen Studio $289 (reg $419). features: rooftop restaurant and bar - Golden Hour, on-site cafe, fitness center, self-parking $25/night subject to change. concessions: complimentary wifi, complimentary welcome drink at check-in. contracting: 90% attrition - client financially responsible for 90% of contracted room block, minimum of 10 rooms per night required. distance 1.8 miles, cutoff 60 days prior to arrival by March 15, 2027.
evals.expected_output: A .docx report where the very long room type wraps or fits without the table running off the page, and the hotel without a verifiable TripAdvisor ranking shows 'TripAdvisor rating not verified' and is flagged to the user under Needs Verification.
